input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.10 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.10
            TITLE: fasteners in the brake system are critical fasteners, see t.8.2

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.10: Fasteners in the Brake System are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
T.3.1.10 Fasteners in the Brake System are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2

final_answer: Fasteners in the Brake System are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
